title.b: How to use the Review Activity Overview Report to find specific information?

task.title: How many Initial reviews were performed?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Initial Reviews KPI card.
step.stepresult: This KPI card displays the aggregated count of initial reviews for all the facilities you have access to.To analyze the data for a specific payer or CDS, select the name from the filter Payer or CDS.

task.title: How many additional reviews were performed?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Additional Reviews KPI card.
step.stepresult: This KPI card displays the aggregated count of additional reviews for all the facilities you have access to.To analyze the data for a specific payer or CDS, select the name from the filter Payer or CDS.

task.title: How many total reviews were actually done vs how many should have been done for a specific facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Facility chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays total reviews performed at each facility against the set objective for that facility. Analyze how many total reviews (initial and additional) were done vs how many should have been done for each facility. Use this chart to analyze if the facility is able to meet the review objective for that facility or not.

task.title: How many initial and additional reviews were actually done by facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Initial and Additional Reviews by Facility chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays count of initial and additional reviews done for each facility in the selected date range.

task.title: How many sent clarifications had financial impact?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select Daily Monitoring from the Analytics screen.
step.stepresult: The report displays data as on today’s date.

step.cmd: Analyze the Financial Impact and Other Impact Clarifications chart.
step.stepresult: The chart displays the count of financially impacted clarifications. Also displays out of total sent clarifications, what percentage were the financially impacted clarifications.To analyze the data for a specific payer or CDS, select the name from the filter Payer or CDS.

task.title: How many total reviews were done for each payer for a specific facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Facility and Payer chart.
step.stepresult: The chart displays count and percentage of total reviews for each payer. Additionally you can compare the percentage of total reviews done for Medicare cases in between two facilities. Also displays out of total reviews done by a facility, what percentage of total reviews were done for Managed Medicare, Medicare, Medicaid, and other Govt payer.

task.title: How does the review count distribution by CDS looks? Were the CDSs able to meet the review objective assigned to them?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by CDS chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays count of total reviews performed by each CDS. This chart also displays the review objective for each CDS. Use this chart to analyze if the CDS is able to meet the review objective or not.To analyze the data for a specific payer or CDS, select the name from the filter Payer or CDS.

task.title: What is the average turnaround time for the initial reviews at facility level?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) KPI card.
step.stepresult: The KPI card displays overall turnaround time at organization level.If you don't have access to all the facilities within the organization, this KPI card displays the aggregated value for only the facilities that you have access to.

step.cmd: Analyze the Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours) by Facility chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays average turnaround time for initial reviews for each facility. This chart helps you to identify the facility that has highest average initial review turnaround time.
